final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand color palette and typography specification sheet for an original, non-infringing fragrance brand named "染秋 (RAN QIU)".

Style/medium: needs an East-Asian ink-and-craft aesthetic rooted in traditional "染" dyeing artistry — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a structured brand guideline layout showing primary colors, secondary colors, and typography specimens in clearly divided sections
Subject: must include the brand identity system for "染秋 (RAN QIU)":
  Brand concept: 东方哲学 / 自然更迭 / 秋日诗意 / 传统"染"工艺美学
  Core ingredients: 桂花 / 柿子 / 枫叶 / 乌龙茶 / 肉桂 / 檀香 / 琥珀
  Core fragrance lines: 桂花乌龙 / 琥珀枫叶 / 柿霜暮色
Scene/backdrop: needs a refined brand-sheet backdrop evoking autumn warmth and oriental restraint — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, poetic, and quietly healing autumn atmosphere — exact mood rendering is yours
Color palette: needs a palette drawn from autumn's natural pigments — deep persimmon orange, osmanthus gold, maple crimson, oolong amber, sandalwood warm brown, ink black, mist white — exact swatches, hex values, and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a surface treatment evoking hand-dyed fabric, washi paper, or lacquer — exact texture weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋", "RAN QIU", "主色", "辅色", "字体规范", and the three fragrance line names "桂花乌龙" / "琥珀枫叶" / "柿霜暮色"
Constraints: must preserve all three sections — primary color swatches, secondary color swatches, and typography specimen — as distinct labeled blocks on one sheet
Avoid:
